steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=5x^2$. To find $f(9)$, substitute $9$ for $x$: $$f(9)=5(9)^2$$ The exponent applies to the substituted input before the multiplication by $5$.

steps.title: Evaluate the square
steps.content: Square first, then multiply: $$f(9)=5(81)=405$$ The value $45$ would come from multiplying before squaring, which does not follow the exponent rule. The answer is D.
